title: One Chicken Problem, Actually Seven
description: Farmer Aldwick has lost seven chickens. He named them all after famous fighters because he thought it would help them survive. It has not helped.

offer.speaker: Farmer Aldwick
offer.text: Seven. There were seven. Cluck Norris. Hen Solo. Feather McGregor. Pecky Balboa. Eggdolph Lundgren. Chick Jagger — I'm aware that one doesn't quite work.

offer.speaker: Farmer Aldwick
offer.text: And the seventh, which escaped before I could name it. Which I consider a personal failure. Three potions and my deepest gratitude to whoever brings them home.

accept.speaker: Farmer Aldwick
accept.text: Corner them gently. They're fighters. It's the names. I did this to myself.

decline.speaker: Farmer Aldwick
decline.text: Seven chickens, out there, alone. With those names. No, no — go on. They'd have wanted it this way.

in_progress.speaker: Farmer Aldwick
in_progress.text: Any sign of them? Pecky can take care of herself, it's Chick Jagger I worry about. No survival instincts. All swagger.

ready_to_turn_in.speaker: Farmer Aldwick
ready_to_turn_in.text: That's — one, two, three... seven. SEVEN. All seven!

complete.speaker: Farmer Aldwick
complete.text: The unnamed one. The old man by the well was feeding her, you say? Kept coming back to him?

complete.speaker: Farmer Aldwick
complete.text: Then she's got a name now. Phil. After the man who took care of her. It's a strange name for a hen. She's a strange hen.

complete.speaker: Farmer Aldwick
complete.text: Three potions, as promised. And take this egg. Cluck Norris lays them so rarely I half believe she does it on purpose. Careful with it. It's... spirited.

objectives.description: Hear Farmer Aldwick out about the seven chickens.
Corner all seven chickens around Harmonia.
Bring the flock home to Aldwick.

rogue.description: Dialogue-only: the Rogue can overhear the chicken near the cave entrance clucking a four-note sequence — the first four notes of the main theme. 'That chicken knows the song. That's a weird song for a chicken to know.' No mechanical effect.

cross_world_connection: W2 Maple Heights has a chicken weathervane the HOA has no record of approving. Rogue (Skater Kid) examine text: 'Phil.' No further explanation.
_wiring_notes: Step 2 is a 7-part movement mini-puzzle owned by overworld: chickens placed at (1) cave entrance, (2) Sleepy Slime Inn kitchen, (3) Scriptweaver's Guild lore section, (4-6) village/surrounds free placement, (7) beside Phil the Lost at the well — Phil is feeding her and has a line: 'I just keep finding it here. It keeps coming back. I don't know why it comes back to me. Maybe it knows something.' Each chicken cornered = increment; at 7, emit quest_world1_one_chicken_problem_all_chickens. Second-layer reading (replay): the unnamed chicken returning to Phil mirrors Phil returning to Harmonia — both staying in a place others pass through. Cosmetic 'Chicken Wrangler' title from the design doc is deferred (no title system).
